column1: banana — common fruit with well-known properties
column10: {"category":"Produce","typical_unit":"1 banana","storage_tip":"Store at room temperature until ripe. To slow ripening, refrigerate once they reach desired ripeness; the peel may darken, but the fruit inside stays good. If peeled or sliced, keep in an airtight container in the refrigerator and use soon.","nutrition_note":"Naturally high in potassium and quick energy from carbohydrates, with some fiber and vitamin B6."}

column1: gochujang — Korean specialty requiring specific knowledge
column10: {"category":"Condiments","typical_unit":"Tub or jar (8–16 oz)","storage_tip":"Unopened: store in a cool, dry pantry. Opened: refrigerate tightly sealed; best quality within several months, though it keeps longer.","nutrition_note":"Distinctive for its spicy-sweet, umami-rich flavor from fermented red chili paste; it can be fairly salty and may contain some sugar, so a little goes a long way."}

column1: quinoa — grain with specific nutritional claims
column4: {"category":"Grains","typical_unit":"1 lb (450 g) bag or tub","storage_tip":"Unopened: store in a cool, dry pantry in an airtight container (or the original sealed bag) for best quality. Opened: keep sealed in an airtight container to prevent moisture/bug exposure.","nutrition_note":"Quinoa stands out as a complete protein grain-like seed (it contains all essential amino acids) and is naturally gluten-free."}
column10: {"category":"Grains","typical_unit":"1 lb bag or 16 oz box","storage_tip":"Unopened quinoa keeps well in a cool, dry pantry. Once opened, store it in an airtight container in the pantry for short-term use, or in the refrigerator/freezer for longer freshness and to prevent rancidity.","nutrition_note":"Naturally gluten-free and notable for being a complete plant protein, meaning it contains all nine essential amino acids."}

column1: tofu — refrigerated item with specific storage needs
column10: {"category":"Refrigerated Plant-Based Proteins","typical_unit":"14 oz package or block","storage_tip":"Unopened tofu keeps in the refrigerator until the use-by date; once opened, drain and store covered in fresh water in a sealed container in the fridge, changing the water daily and using within 3 to 5 days. For longer storage, freeze unopened or drained tofu.","nutrition_note":"High in plant-based protein; also notable for being low in saturated fat and a good source of calcium or iron when fortified, depending on the brand."}

column1: saffron — expensive spice sold in tiny quantities
column4: {"category":"Spices","typical_unit":"0.01–0.05 g threads or small sachet (often ~0.1–0.2 g)","storage_tip":"Keep unopened saffron in an airtight container in a cool, dark pantry. After opening, reseal tightly and store away from heat/moisture to preserve aroma and color (best used within ~6–12 months).","nutrition_note":"Most distinctive trait: saffron’s intense color and aroma from its carotenoid compounds—it's used in tiny amounts, so it contributes flavor more than significant calories or macronutrients."}
column10: {"category":"Spices","typical_unit":"small jar or tin (threads/powder), often sold by gram or small envelope","storage_tip":"Store unopened saffron in a cool, dark, dry pantry. After opening, keep it tightly sealed away from light, heat, and moisture; for best flavor, use within a year.","nutrition_note":"Its most distinctive trait is an intense aroma, flavor, and golden-yellow coloring power despite being used in tiny amounts; it contributes negligible calories and no meaningful macronutrients in typical servings."}
column14: The first three fields are accurate - category is correctly 'Spices', typical unit reflects small quantities sold by gram, and storage tip mentions airtight/sealed, dark, and cool conditions. However, the nutrition note fails to mention antioxidants or specific bioactive properties (such as crocin, safranal, or picrocrocin) as required by the rubric. It only describes coloring power, aroma, and negligible calories, which doesn't satisfy the requirement for antioxidant or specific property information.
